zh.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon是Archambaud de Montluçon和N.N. de Mello的女兒，於1196年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c。她於1215年與Archambaud VIII de Bourbon在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1249年在法國奧維普-德-o維萊特享年53歲，埋葬在法國奧維普-德-o維萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon是Archambaud de Montluçon和N.N. de Mello的女儿，于1196年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也蒙特盧c。她于1215年与Archambaud VIII de Bourbon在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1249年在法国奧維普-德-o維萊特享年53岁，埋葬在法国奧維普-德-o維萊特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon was born in 1196, in Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France as the daughter of Archambaud de Montluçon and N.N. de Mello. She married Archambaud VIII de Bourbon in 1215, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1249, in Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon est née en 1196, à Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, fille de Archambaud de Montluçon et N.N. de Mello. Elle a épousé Archambaud VIII de Bourbon en 1215, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1249, à Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon wurde 1196 in Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich, als Tochter von Archambaud de Montluçon und N.N. de Mello geboren. Sie hat 1215 in Frankreich Archambaud VIII de Bourbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1249 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich und wurde in Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon è nata il nel 1196 nel Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia come figlia di Archambaud de Montluçon e N.N. de Mello. Lei sposato Archambaud VIII de Bourbon nel 1215, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1249, nel Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçonは1196年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールモントルcオンでArchambaud de MontluçonとN.N. de Melloの娘として生まれた。1215年にフランスでArchambaud VIII de Bourbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1249年にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメバーレットで53歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメバーレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon(은)는 1196년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 몽루c에서 Archambaud de Montluçon(와)과 N.N. de Mello의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1215년 프랑스에서 Archambaud VIII de Bourbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 버렛에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 버렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon nasceu em 1196, em Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França filha de Archambaud de Montluçon e N.N. de Mello. Ela casou-se com Archambaud VIII de Bourbon em 1215, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1249, em Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon родилась в 1196 г. в местности монтлуcон, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. Её родителей звали Archambaud de Montluçon и N.N. de Mello. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archambaud VIII de Bourbon в 1215 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1249 г. в местности вирлет, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности вирлет, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Béatrix de Montluçon nació en 1196, en Montluçon, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia como hija de Archambaud de Montluçon y N.N. de Mello. Se casó con Archambaud VIII de Bourbon en 1215, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1249, en Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Virlet, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia.
